$description: Component tokens for Mobile Slider — a horizontal range input control with a draggable knob on a track. Supports 3 types (Simple, Range, Segment), 5 states (Default, Start, End, Label, Disabled), 2 platforms (Android, iOS), and 2 placeholder modes (Default number / Icon). Figma Reference: Node ID 359-21258

$component.name: Slider
$component.description: A horizontal input control for selecting a value or range from a continuous or discrete set of values. The track shows the total range; the filled indicator shows selected progress from the left edge to the knob (Simple) or between two knobs (Range). In Segment type, the track is divided into 10 discrete equal-width segments. A floating Label variant shows a Tag chip above the knob with the current value. The Disabled state mutes the fill color and swaps the knob to its disabled variant.
$component.structure: Container div (full-width, 24px or 56px tall). Track div (6px tall, gray, full-width, absolutely positioned at vertical center). Fill div (same height as track, primary blue, stretches left→knob for Simple, between knobs for Range). Knob component (24px for Android / 38×24px for iOS, absolutely positioned at current value). Optional Label Tag (28px, floats above knob in Label state).

type.Simple: Single knob. Fill grows from left edge to knob position.
type.Range: Two knobs. Fill shows between the two knob positions. Left knob controls minimum, right controls maximum.
type.Segment: Single knob. Track divided into 10 discrete equal-width segments with 2px gaps. Completed segments are primary/blue/700; remaining segments are gray/300.

state.Default: Knob at midpoint (50%). Normal interactive state.
state.Start: Knob at left edge (0%). No fill shown.
state.End: Knob at right edge (100%). Full fill shown.
state.Label: Knob at midpoint with a floating Tag chip above it showing the current value. Container is taller (56px) to accommodate the label above the track.
state.Disabled: Non-interactive. Fill uses gray/400 instead of primary/700. Knob uses disabled state (gray/600 for iOS, disabled SVG asset for Android).

variants.platform: Android | iOS — affects knob rendering (SVG vs CSS pill)
variants.placeholder: Default | Icon — controls whether knob uses standard or icon variant

subComponents.knob: knob.json — the default drag handle (used when placeholder=Default)
subComponents.iconKnob: icon-knob.json — the icon-bearing drag handle (used when placeholder=Icon)

usage.contexts: Volume controls, price range filters, brightness/speed adjusters, stepped value selectors.
usage.features: 3 types (Simple/Range/Segment), 5 states, 2 platforms, optional floating label, 10-segment discrete mode, HighRise Tag integration for Label state

container.$comment: Outer bounding container. Height varies between default state (24px) and label state (56px).

default.description: Mobile slider container height for Default/Start/End/Disabled states - 24px (3xs - 24px)

label.description: Mobile slider container height for Label state - 56px (2xl - 56px)

track.$comment: The full-width background bar representing the total selectable range

color.description: Mobile slider track background color - gray/300 - #d0d5dd (the unfilled portion of the range)

fill.$comment: The colored indicator that shows the selected portion of the range. Grows from left edge to knob position (Simple) or between two knobs (Range).

left.description: Mobile slider fill left border radius - 8px (rounded-bl-[8px] rounded-tl-[8px] in Figma — left end of fill is always rounded)

right.description: Mobile slider fill right border radius - 8px (rounded right end when fill extends to 100%; at partial fill the right edge is flush against the knob)

default.description: Mobile slider fill color for Default/Start/End/Label states - primary/blue/700 - #004eeb

disabled.description: Mobile slider fill color for Disabled state - gray/400 - #98a2b3 (muted fill when slider is non-interactive)

segment.$comment: Properties specific to Segment type — the track divided into 10 discrete equal-width segments with gaps between them

count.description: Mobile slider segment count for Segment type - 10 discrete equal-width segments (each represents 10% of the total range)

gap.description: Mobile slider segment gap - ~2px between each segment (calculated from Figma inset values: 0.55% of 361px reference width ≈ 2px)

border-radius.description: Mobile slider segment border radius - 8px applied to each discrete segment (rounded-[8px] in Figma)

filled.description: Mobile slider segment fill color for completed/selected segments - primary/blue/700 - #004eeb

empty.description: Mobile slider segment fill color for uncompleted/unselected segments - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

label.$comment: Floating value label shown in the Label state — a Tag chip that appears above the knob showing the current value. Only visible when state=Label.

height.description: Mobile slider label Tag height - 28px (Tag size lg)

typography.description: Mobile slider label text typography - 13px Medium, 18px line-height (font/size/md, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/md)

background.description: Mobile slider label Tag background color - primary/100 - #eff4ff (tag/primary/background/default in Figma)

color.description: Mobile slider label text color - primary/blue/700 - #004eeb (tag/primary/label-color/default in Figma)

border-radius.description: Mobile slider label Tag border radius - 14px (rounded-[14px] in Figma — half of the 28px Tag height for pill shape)

horizontal.description: Mobile slider label Tag horizontal padding - 8px (px-[8px] in Figma)

knob.$comment: Layout positioning for the knob within the slider track

shadow.description: Mobile slider knob drop shadow - shadow/md: 0px 2px 4px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.06), 0px 4px 8px -2px rgba(16,24,40,0.10)
